---
title: "Korean 한국어"
subtitle: "Yuna Lee"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: "./_assets/spe_biliteracy_cover_slide.png"
  data-background-size: "cover"
---

## Introduce Myself

<img src="./_assets/spe_biliteracy_header.png" class="spe-header">

[Hello, my name is Yuna Lee! I am a fifth grader at Summit Pointe Elementary School.  ]{.fragment}


[안녕하세요, 이유나 입니다. 저는 써밋 포인트 초등학교 5학년입니다.]{.fragment}

## What I Learned

<img src="./_assets/spe_biliteracy_header.png" class="spe-header">

::::{.columns}

:::{.column width="50%" .fragment}

Korean writing system is simple, because its writen the way it is pronunced!

:::{.incremental}
- First, you need a consonent.
- Then, you need to add the vowel to the first consonent to complete the word you write.
- If nesaeary, you have to add the final consonent below the first consonent and vowel combination.
- The final consonent is also known as the Batchim (받침.)
:::

:::


:::{.column width="50%" .fragment}

:::{.no-gap}
![
[source: EasyTalkKorean (2023)](https://blog.naver.com/dotdot_n_connect/223229105280){style="margin-left:20px;font-size:.8em;"}<br>
[**A mechanism to write Korean**]{style="margin-left:20px;"}
](./_assets/spe_biliteracy_hangul_explanation.png)
:::

#### [Examples]{.fragment}

::::{.columns style="font-size:0.8em;" .fragment}
:::{.column width="40%"}

* 사람 - Person
* 친구 - Friend
* 학생- Student
:::

:::{.column width="40%"}

* 선생님- Teacher
* 어머니- Mother
* 아버지- Father
:::

::::
:::

::::

## My Motivations

<img src="./_assets/spe_biliteracy_header.png" class="spe-header">

[The reason why I chose to study Korean 
is to communicate better with my parents and my grandparents when I talk
to them during Facetime calls, also when I talk to my aunt and uncle. 
Although I know how to speak Korean, my knowledge is not fullproof.]{.fragment}

[제가 한국어를 배우기로 결심한 
이유는 부모님께서 한국 출신이시고 한국어를 사용하시며, 조부모님 또한
한국분이셔서 그분들 모두와 더 원활하게 소통하고 싶었기 때문입니다.
저는 한국어를 말할 수 있지만 읽기와 쓰기는 서툽니다.]{.fragment}

## In the Future

<img src="./_assets/spe_biliteracy_header.png" class="spe-header">

* I would use this knowledge to talk and type to my family and friends.
* I could use this knowledge at Korean Mass, during TV shows, reading, and 
Facetime calls with my grandparents, my aunt and my uncle.
* I also could use this knowledge to help me learn other languages like Spanish or 
Japanese from my father who speaks Japanese fluently.

## New Language Learning is Important


<img src="./_assets/spe_biliteracy_header.png" class="spe-header">

Learning a new language is important because it helps a single individual to understand other cultures and traditions.
I think that people will open their hearts to learn about new and unfamiliar cultures by learning a new language to understand
people worldwide who have a different traditions.
